member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterCache
member.summary: Used to limit the types and members of said type can be accessed through WinterForge

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterCache.Filters
member.summary: all the filters

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterCache.GetFilter(System.Type,WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind)
member.summary: Gets the filter for the given . if it doesnt exist yet, a whitelist or blacklist is created depending on the global state

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterCache.Cache(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Type})
member.summary: Builds the cache with the given type filters

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterCache.Prefill(System.Action{WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter},WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Type})
member.summary: Builds the cache with the given type filters and applies the on each

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter
member.summary: Defines granular allow/deny rules for member access on a specific runtime type.

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.TypeName
member.summary: Fully‑qualified name (e.g. "System.Collections.Generic.List`1") of the target type.

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.Type
member.summary: Runtime resolved from

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.GovernedMembers
member.summary:
Explicit member names governed by this filter.
Whitelist mode > members allowed
Blacklist mode > members blocked

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.ExceptThese
member.summary: These members are explicitly exemt from the filter.

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.FilterKind
member.summary: The kind of filter this is

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.IsWhitelist
member.summary: if this instance represents a whitelist, otherwise it acts as a blacklist.

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.IsBlacklist
member.summary: if this instance represents a blacklist, otherwise it acts as a whitelist.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.IsAllowed(System.String)
member.summary: Whether the filter allows or disallows the member with the given name. does not govern for member names that dont exist on the type

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.Govern(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.String})
member.summary: Adds all the provided members to this filter

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilter.Except(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.String})
member.summary: Adds all the provided members to

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind
member.summary: Global default policy that WinterForge applies when evaluating s.

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind.Blacklist
member.summary: Members are permitted unless they are within the filter

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AccessFilterKind.Whitelist
member.summary: Members are permitted only when they are in the filter

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.FlowHookAttribute.IsAwaited
member.summary: When the method returns a , this property indicates whether the task is awaited or not.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.CustomValueProviderINTERNAL
member.summary: Used internally to browse types to find custom value providers

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.CustomValueProviderINTERNAL.OnNull
member.summary: If the value from the serialized data represents null, this method is called.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer
member.summary: The system to automatically serialize a runtime object to the human readable format

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.#ctor(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressTracker)
member.summary: The system to automatically serialize a runtime object to the human readable format

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.ParseTypeName(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the type name in a normal way

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.ParseTypeName(System.Type,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the type name in a normal way
member.param: When true, and is , will return "Null-Type" as string

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.SerializeToString(System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes the given object to a string using the serialization system

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.SerializeToFile(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Serializes the given object directly to a file

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.Serialize(System.Object,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Serializes the given object to the given stream

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.SerializeToString(System.Object@)
member.summary: Serializes the given object to a string using the serialization system

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.SerializeToFile(System.Object@,System.String)
member.summary: Serializes the given object directly to a file

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.ObjectSerializer.Serialize(System.Object@,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Serializes the given object to the given stream

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM
member.summary: Used to deserialize a collection of

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.Debug
member.summary: Enables some

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.DebugAutoPrint
member.summary: when true, prints the debug stuff to the console automatically. it really is for debug

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.BuiltinFunctions
member.summary: The default functions, if their entry here does not contain a closing ) they may accept argument(s)

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.OpcodeTiming
member.param: The amount of times the VM enumerator has to have its next() called until it goes to the next instruction

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.OpcodeTiming.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.param: The amount of times the VM enumerator has to have its next() called until it goes to the next instruction

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.#ctor
member.summary: Create a new instance of the to deserialize objects

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the resources of the VM

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Workers.WinterForgeVM.ResolveType(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the type from a string that was generated using back into a reference

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.BeforeSerializeAttribute
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right before the instance is going to be serialized

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.BeforeSerializeAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right before the instance is going to be serialized

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.BeforeDeserializeAttribute
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right before the instance is going to be deserialzied (at this point the instance is created, but no fields have been touched yet)

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.BeforeDeserializeAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right before the instance is going to be deserialzied (at this point the instance is created, but no fields have been touched yet)

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AfterDeserializeAttribute
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right after deserialization has happened for this specific instance

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.AfterDeserializeAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Winterforge invokes the method right after deserialization has happened for this specific instance

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.CustomValueProvider`1
member.summary: Used to create a custom way to define the way a type is stored using the serialization system.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Compiling.CustomValueCompiler`1.Compile(System.IO.BinaryWriter,`0)
member.summary: Compile the value into a binary format

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Compiling.CustomValueCompiler`1.Decompile(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Decompile the value from binary format

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Compiling.OpcodeToByteCompiler.Compile
member.summary: Synchronously reads the entire input stream line-by-line, compiles opcodes and writes bytes to the destination stream. This method blocks until processing is complete.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeFormatException
member.summary: Thrown when the format trying to parse or deserialize was not correct

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Expressions.ExpressionUtils
member.summary: Small helpers that use the tokenizer to detect whether a string contains a "true expression" (i.e. arithmetic/boolean/comparison operators) outside of quotes.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Expressions.ExpressionUtils.ContainsExpressionOutsideQuotes(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the input contains expression operators (math/boolean/comparison) outside quotes. Member access chains and single function calls (no operators) will return false.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ContainerParser
member.summary: A static class to parse containsers from human readable WinterForge syntax

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ContainerParser.ParseTemplate(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableParser,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.IO.StreamWriter)
member.summary: Public helper to parse a single template. Header is the content after "#template" (e.g. "Foo int n"). bodyLines should be the inner lines (ReadBlockContent result) + typically a trailing "}" if caller expects it. This emits TEMPLATE_CREATE, enqueues the body into the parser and emits TEMPLATE_END.
Overload accepting already-parsed name + param tuples (avoids re-tokenizing).
Parse a single constructor (container-named block) given parsed param tuples.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableIndenter
member.summary: Indents the human readable format created by

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableParser.Parse(System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Parses the human readable format of WinterForge into the opcodes that the understands. so that the can deserialize
member.param: The source of human readable format
The destination where the WinterForge opcodes will end up
member.remarks: Appends a line 'WF_ENDOFDATA' when is of type

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableParser.ParseBlockLine(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Returns True when end of block is reached

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableParser.ThrowParseError(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Throws a formatted parse error with line and column information.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.HumanReadableParser.ThrowParseError(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Throws a formatted parse error at a specific position in a line.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ParserErrorContext
member.summary: Tracks the current parsing location for Rust-style error reporting.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ParserErrorContext.AdvanceLine(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the line number and resets column to 1.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ParserErrorContext.SetColumnInLine(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates the column position within the current line.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ParserErrorContext.FormatError(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a Rust-style error message with context visualization.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.ParserErrorContext.FormatErrorWithContext(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a Rust-style error with multiple context lines (before and after).

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Formatting.WinterForgeParseException
member.summary: Enhanced exception with Rust-style error formatting.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat
member.summary: What format should serialize to

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat.HumanReadable
member.summary: Plain text format, easer to read than but minimal formatting.

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat.FormattedHumanReadable
member.summary: Text format with indentation for better readability.

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat.IntermediateRepresentation
member.summary: Textual opcode format. think IL for .NET, but for WinterForge.

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat.Optimized
member.summary: Bytecode format optimized for speed.

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.InclusionRules.InclusionRule
member.summary: Defines a set of rules for whether or not a field or property is to be automatically included in serialization

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.InclusionRules.InclusionRule.Weight
member.summary: The weight of this rule

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.InclusionRules.InclusionRule.ShouldInclude(WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData,System.Boolean)
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, Returns when the member should be serialized, if not

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.InclusionRules.InclusionRuleset
member.summary: Acts as the central point of where the inclusion rules are stored and called

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.Instruction
member.summary: An instruction used by the WinterForge VM

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.Instruction.#ctor(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode,System.Object[])
member.summary: An instruction used by the WinterForge VM

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.Instruction.Opcode
member.summary: The instruction opcode

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.Instruction.Args
member.summary: The arguments of the opcode, if any

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode
member.summary: Operation codes that the deserialization process for WinterForge understands

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.DEFINE
member.summary:
Defines an object.
EG "0 System.Numerics.Vector3 0 0"
0 - define
type name
object ID of 0
0 items from the stack for constructor arguments

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.SET
member.summary:
Sets the value of a field on the current object
EG "1 X 25"
1 - SET
X - field name
25 - value

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.END
member.summary:
Ends the working on the most recent defined object.
EG "2 0"
2 - END
0 - object key its ending. this must match the most recent defined object that has not yet had this end operation called on it.

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.PUSH
member.summary:
pushes a value to the stack. used for constructor and method calls
EG "3 5"
3 - PUSH
5 - value. value can also be a #ref() or #stack() call

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.CALL
member.summary: Calls a method. this opcode has not yet been fully designed. therefor an example can not yet be given

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.ELEMENT
member.summary:
Adds an element to the current list
EG "5 #ref(4)"
5 - ELEMENT
#ref(4) - value, the reference of an object with ID 4

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.LIST_START
member.summary:
begins creating a new list
EG "6 System.Numerics.Vector3"
6 - LIST_START
list item type

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.LIST_END
member.summary:
Ends a list and puts it to the stack. can then be accessed by using '#stack()'
Has no arguments. line should be only "7".

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.RET
member.summary:
tells the to return the object of which key is given
EG "8 4"
8 - RETURN
4 - key of which object reference to return

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.PROGRESS
member.summary: invokes

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.ACCESS
member.summary:
Attempts to access the top stack value. on success puts the value on the stack. on fail, exception
EG: "10 Player"

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.SETACCESS
member.summary:
Sets the value on the top stack value, rather than the current working object
refer to for the example

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.AS
member.summary:
Takes the top stack item and puts it as a reference item on the given ID (can be used to override an id reference)
EG: 12 0
12 - AS
0 - store the stack item on ID 0. even if an object at that ID already exists

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.START_STR
member.summary: Starts a multiline string

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.STR
member.summary: Adds a line inside a multiline string

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.END_STR
member.summary: Ends a multiline string

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.ALIAS
member.summary:
aliases a ref object under the given name
eg:
16 0 player
16 - ALIAS
0 - the ref id
player - the alias to give it

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.ANONYMOUS_SET
member.summary:
lets the type and name of a field inside an anonymous object definition
eg:
17 System.Int32 X 5
17 - ANONYMOUS_SET
System.Int32 - the type of the field
X - the name of the field
5 - the value of the field
member.remarks: This requres a value, to define a value with its default value for the given type, set the value to 'default'

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.IMPORT
member.summary:
Imports another winterforge file. only accepts opcode files
18 filename id

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.CREATE_REF
member.summary: Creates the second argument as a ref value on the refid that is the first argument Not used in saved files, exclusively used when reading binary compiled WinterForge files that use custom compilers

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.TEMPLATE_CREATE
member.summary: Unused in this version

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.TEMPLATE_END
member.summary: Unused in this version

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Instructions.OpCode.END_OF_DATA
member.summary: represents the end of data in a winterforge byte stream

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.ProgressMark.CurrentInstruction
member.summary: The current instruction the deserializer is on

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.ProgressMark.InstructionCount
member.summary: The total amount of instructions the deserializer has to work through

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeCompositeLogger
member.summary: Holds reference to several subclasses so logging can go to more than one place

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeCompositeLogger.#ctor(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity)
member.summary: Holds reference to several subclasses so logging can go to more than one place

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeConsoleLogger
member.summary: A default implementation of that writes to the console
member.param: The level of verbosity to use when reporting progress
Whether to include the current time in log messages

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeConsoleLogger.#ctor(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity,System.Boolean)
member.summary: A default implementation of that writes to the console
member.param: The level of verbosity to use when reporting progress
Whether to include the current time in log messages

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity
member.summary: When should mark its progress

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity.None
member.summary: Never

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity.Instance
member.summary: When an instance has been created

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity.ClassOnly
member.summary: When a class has been created, structs dont count

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressVerbosity.Full
member.summary: When classes or structs are created, and for each field that is handled

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressTracker
member.summary: An abstract class to hook into WinterForge progress in its process to serialize or deserialize a data structure

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressTracker.Report(System.String)
member.summary: Invoked when a new message is ready

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressTracker.Report(System.Single)
member.summary: Invoked when new progress has been made

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Nothing
member.summary: has no specific object to return.

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Nothing.AllDeserializedObjects
member.summary: The collection of all the objects that were deserialized

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Util.PropertyKind
member.summary: Defines the kind of property any property is identified as

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Util.PropertyKind.Unknown
member.summary: The kind is unknown

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Util.PropertyKind.Custom
member.summary: The property has custom logic defined

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Util.PropertyKind.Auto
member.summary:
The property is an auto property.
eg: public int MyProp { get; set; }

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1
member.summary: The base class for and

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.Exception
member.summary: The exception thrown, returns when = and throws the exception when not yet completed/errored

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.IsCompleted
member.summary: Whether the task was completed

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.IsCompletedFaulty
member.summary: Whether or not there was an exception thrown

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.IsCompletedSuccessfully
member.summary: Whether the task was completed successfully

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.ProgressTracker
member.summary: The progress tracker used for this deserialization process

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.Result
member.summary: The result. throws the exception when not yet completed

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.GetResult
member.summary: Gets the result of the response, and waits if required

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeAsyncTask`1.OnCompleted(System.Action)
member.summary: Sets the continuation action for this task

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeDeserializationTask`1
member.summary: Represents an asynchrounous task for where is the desired return type for the deserialization process

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeDeserializationTask`1.op_Implicit(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeDeserializationTask{`0})~`0
member.summary: Gets the result, and waits if required

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction
member.summary:
Generalized block state that overrules any
All settings are global and do not strictly override they merely act on top of that.
EG:
blocks all method calls, but allows variable accesses. but if a exists blocking a variable, its still blocked
member.remarks: NOTE: using this may restrict the usage of serializing static types / members

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction.AllAccessing
member.summary:
Any and all accessing is blocked (syntax using ->)
Serializing statics is not possible with this value

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction.InstanceOnly
member.summary:
Any and all accessing on static types is blocked.
Serializing statics is not possible with this value

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction.InstanceVariablesOnly
member.summary:
Any and all accessing on statics and instance methods is blocked
Serializing statics is not possible with this value

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction.StaticAndInstanceVariableOnly
member.summary:
Any and all method calls both static and instance are blocked.
Serializing statics is possible with this value

member.name: F:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeGlobalAccessRestriction.NoGlobalBlock
member.summary: no global block rule. everything is dictated by the

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeSerializationTask
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous serialization task

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeSerializationTask.op_Implicit(WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForgeSerializationTask)~System.String
member.summary: Gets the string, and waits if required

member.name: T:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge
member.summary:
The main delegation class for the WinterForge serialization system.
First use tends to take a whole lot longer due to caching and JIT.
Do you have feedback, or are you hitting a wall? Feel free to reach out on Discord: 'thesnowowl'

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.WorkingDir
member.summary:
The working directory WinterForge uses. accessd by "#workingDir()"
This property is whitelisted for the default WinterForge class access filter

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.ImportDir
member.summary: The directory scripts will be imported from when using a #import statement

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.NoDefaultAccessFilters
member.summary:
When true, all default access filters will NOT be applied.
Default is to false

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.AllowedScriptingLevel
member.summary:
Whether or not the scripting part of winterforge is enabled
That being templates(functions), containers(classes), and loops
Accessing is not a part of this.
Default:

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.SupportedPrimitives
member.summary: The primitive types that are handled as-is by WinterForge

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.AllowCustomCompilers
member.summary: Setting this to false can increase the load times of certain larger datasets, however the scripting side of WinterForge can have issues with this is enabled

member.name: P:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.CompressedStreams
member.summary: When true, all serialization streams will be compressed using GZip compression. It will also expect compressed streams when deserializing, but will also attempt to read it as uncompressed if that fails.

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.WinterForge.SerializeToFile(System.Object,System.String,WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.TargetFormat,WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.Logging.WinterForgeProgressTracker)
member.summary: Serializes the given object directly to opcodes for fastest deserialization

member.name: M:WinterRose.WinterForgeSerializing.InstructionParser.ParseOpcodes(System.IO.Stream,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Parses opcodes into instructions. inserting a progress mark every .
eg: if is 20, 3 will be inserted

member.name: T:WinterRose.NotCachedAttribute
member.summary: Notifies not to cache this object duing serialization
member.remarks: NOTE: this may lead to a stack overflow if a type using this attribute is part of a circle reference

member.name: T:WinterRose.SerializeAsAttribute`1
member.summary: Tells the serializer to serialize this class as the given type, even if the serializer would normally serialize it as a different type

member.name: P:WinterRose.SerializeAsAttribute`1.Type
member.summary: The type this class should be serialized as

member.name: T:WinterRose.WFExcludeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the field or properties is to not be serialized by

member.name: T:WinterRose.WFIncludeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that this property/field should be included when calling any of the serialize methods of

member.name: P:WinterRose.WFIncludeAttribute.Priority
member.summary: Specifies where this property/field should be in the automatic serialization

member.name: M:WinterRose.TempFile.#ctor(System.String,System.IO.FileShare,System.IO.FileAccess)
member.summary: Construct from an explicit path. Overwrites existing file by default.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TempFile.#ctor(System.IO.FileShare,System.IO.FileAccess,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new temp file inside the WinterRose temp folder with an optional extension. Uses a Guid-based filename to avoid collisions.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TempFile.#ctor(System.IO.Stream,System.IO.FileShare,System.IO.FileAccess,System.String)
M:WinterRose.TempFile.CreateUniqueTempPath(System.String)
member.summary: Helper that ensures the WinterRose temp folder exists and returns a unique file path.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TempFile.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Expose a friendly Dispose that also attempts a best-effort cleanup. FileOptions.DeleteOnClose should cover most cases; attempt to delete if still present.

member.name: M:WinterRose.NetworkServer.CacheReader.CreateFallbackReader
member.summary: Creates a new stream that holds the same information of this one.

member.name: T:WinterRose.TextWriterStream
member.summary: A stream wrapper for a text writer
